population: Sepsis 3.0 patients admitted to ICU (MIMIC-IV database)
method: Comparison between survival and death groups

auc_value: AUC 0.606 (95% CI: 0.587–0.625) for HCT predicting mortality (N=4497)
notes: Death group had lower hematocrit levels compared to survival group (P<0.05). 911 deaths within 30 days. Death group was also older with lower albumin, platelets, and hemoglobin levels.

auc_value: AUC 0.606 (95% CI: 0.587–0.625) for HCT predicting mortality (N=4497)
notes: 30-day all-cause mortality rate was 44.2%. The proportion of patients with low hct levels was significantly increased in the 30-day mortality group compared to the survival group, while the proportions in the regular and high hct level groups gradually decreased.
